title: Why did England struggle against DR Congo - and what can they learn?
summary: England defeated DR Congo in their World Cup round of 32 match, with tactical lessons for their upcoming opponent Mexico. The victory demonstrated England's ability to adapt and overcome challenges to advance to the next stage.
content: A tactical analysis of England's victory over DR Congo - and what it might teach them for their next World Cup match against Mexico.

zh.title: 英格兰为何在与刚果民主共和国的比赛中苦战？他们能学到什么？
zh.summary: 英格兰在世界杯32强比赛中战胜刚果民主共和国，对即将到来的对手墨西哥提供了战术启示。这场胜利展示了英格兰的适应能力和克服挑战晋级下一阶段的能力。
